name: Conversational AI — Question + Exa Research + Claude Answer to Slack
description: Takes a conversational question, enriches it with Exa web search for real-time context, uses Claude AI to generate a well-researched conversational response, and posts it to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI voice chat using webhook, Memory Manager, OpenAI, Google Gemini & ElevenLabs

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the response

question.description: Conversational question or topic to discuss

steps.name: Search for relevant context with Exa
Parse Exa results into conversation context
Run Claude AI to generate conversational response
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit conversational message
